message:
fix(tests): update golden vectors for linear.plan_sync and github.process_webhook operations

The Linear connector gained a plan_sync operation and the GitHub
connector gained a process_webhook operation, but the corresponding
golden vector and integration tests were not updated to include them.
This caused assertion failures on operation count comparisons.

Verified: fcp-manifest golden vectors (171 pass), fcp-github integration
(64 pass) on remote worker vmi1152480.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
